home.eyebrow: Scent discovery based on how you feel
home.subtitle: Answer a few simple questions about your mood and taste, and we'll suggest perfumes you'll probably fall in love with — no more drowning in hundreds of options.
home.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to your scent

steps.title: Answer a few questions
steps.text: Sensory and practical questions about spaces, moments and your taste.

steps.title: Your taste gets analyzed
steps.text: Your answers are turned into a numeric profile of scent families.

steps.title: Get your perfumes
steps.text: The five best-matching perfumes, each with a match percentage.

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Odora discovers your scent with you.
about.p1: Choosing a perfume among hundreds of options is overwhelming. We made it simple: with a few short questions about your mood and taste, we turn your scent preferences into a numeric profile and suggest the closest matches from dozens of famous perfumes.
about.p2: No ads and no sales bias — just a real match between your taste and each perfume's character.

values.title: Personalized
values.text: Suggestions are built from your own answers, not from bestseller lists.

values.title: Transparent
values.text: For every perfume you see how close it is to your taste — and why.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.lead: Questions, suggestions or partnership? We'd love to hear from you.

gender.title: What style are you looking for?
gender.subtitle: Your choice also tunes the site's colors to match your taste.
gender.changeHint: You can change your choice anytime

moment.title: Which moment feels most like you?

families.title: Rate each scent family
families.subtitle: Rate each one from 1 (low) to 5 (high) based on how much you like it

occasion.title: Where will you wear it most?

strength.title: How strong do you like it?

woody.name: Woody
woody.desc: Warm and dry, like sandalwood and cedar

citrus.name: Citrus
citrus.desc: Fresh and lively, like lemon and bergamot

floral.name: Floral
floral.desc: Soft and romantic, like rose and jasmine

sweet.name: Sweet
sweet.desc: Cozy and warm, like vanilla and caramel

spicy.name: Spicy
spicy.desc: Warm and passionate, like cinnamon and cardamom

oud.name: Oud / Musky
oud.desc: Deep and luxurious, like oud and musk

aquatic.name: Aquatic
aquatic.desc: Cool and clean, like sea breeze and rain
